raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main concept (DialogueDev) and proposes a reframing to focus on Reflective Subgoal Prompting (RSP), which survives prior-work contrast by being compared against a vanilla zero-shot baseline.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the argument chain, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs for logical consistency.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the gains from RSP are largely orthogonal to those obtained from agent decomposition) by stating that the section asserts orthogonality without reporting the factorial result.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on DialogueDev instead of RSP.",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the GitHub-issue numbers are reported without confidence intervals or a significance statement).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but the exact pass@1 protocol is not stated."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main concept (DialogueDev) and proposes a reframing to focus on Reflective Subgoal Prompting (RSP), which survives prior-work contrast by being compared against a vanilla zero-shot baseline.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the argument chain, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs for logical consistency.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the gains from RSP are largely orthogonal to those obtained from agent decomposition) by stating that the section asserts orthogonality without reporting the factorial result.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on DialogueDev instead of RSP.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the GitHub-issue numbers are reported without confidence intervals or a significance statement).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but the exact pass@1 protocol is not stated.
